items.title: Gas Pipeline Maintenance Via Data Mining
items.meta: A project aimed at predictive maintenance for National Iran's Gas Company supervisied by Dr. Alireza Fereidunian (2021-2022)

items.title: Research Internsip on Approximate Similarty Search
items.meta: Due to Covid pandemic (2020-2021), I worked remotely at Shomara on approximate nearest neighbor search algorithms, e.g. (FAISS). I did a literature study and classification of methods, and compared different methods, in practice. This was presented as a technical report, with quick-start guides for future solutions at Shomara.

items.title: Open Source Project: for Training Object Detection Models on Persian License Plates
items.meta: A long-term open-source project (2019-2020) aimed at making training object detection or segmentation models easier for Persian fonts by generating synthetic images of Persian license plate with data augmentation.

items.title: C# Unity Game Developer
items.meta:

Key responsibilities included source code optimization and development.
